prompt: Photograph of a finished deck-stain restoration on a Salem NH backyard deck — pressure-treated decking and railing freshly stained in a warm cedar tone, semi-transparent so the wood grain shows through. The boards run horizontally across the frame, the railing cap and balusters at the rear. Crisp clean edges where stain meets painted-white skirt board. Mid-day even light. High-contrast, slightly desaturated photography, working-contractor documentary catalog feel — NOT HGTV bright, NOT luxury hotel-staged, NOT real-estate photographer brightness. The lighting in a Snap-On distributor's tool room. No people in frame, no readable text anywhere, no logos, no brand names visible.
